final:
module RefModule(
  input wire D,
  input wire C,
  input wire PRE,
  output reg Q
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @ (posedge C or posedge PRE or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (PRE) begin
      Q <= 1'b1;
    end else begin
      Q <= D;
    end
  end

endmodule
